title: Ancient Javanese Mask Collection
description: Our hotel features a remarkable collection of ancient Javanese and Balinese artifacts, showcasing the island's rich cultural heritage. This unique collection includes intricately carved wooden masks representing traditional folklore.

title: Batik Textiles & Antique Crafts
description: Vibrant batik textiles and delicate antique pottery collected from remote corners across the Indonesian archipelago. Each piece reflects the historic artistic traditions that have shaped Java's history.

title: Executive Suite Layout
description: A close look inside our elegant Executive Room suite layout, blending the charm of modern premium hospitality with the sophisticated boutique accents of the colonial era.

title: Tiara Restaurant & Poolside Bistro
description: An oasis in the very heart of Bandung. Guests can relax at our outdoor swimming pool lounge and indulge in authentic local Indonesian dishes served daily at Tiara Café.

title: Traditional Art Collection for Sale
description: Exquisite collections of traditional oil paintings and antique collectibles available for purchase, offering guests an opportunity to take home a piece of Bandung's rich cultural heritage.

title: Spacious Premium Family Suites
description: Providing ample space and ultimate comfort for relaxing stays together, featuring a spacious living area perfect for families to socialise in true boutique style.
